The ability to insert and remove dentures into and from the mouth, and manage denture soaking and rinsing with use of equipment. effective 10/01/2019
759 GG0130C5_SELF_CARE_TOILTG_CD GG0130C5_SELF_CARE_TOILTG_CD GG0130C5 Self Care: Toileting Hygiene Ability (Interim Perf) CHAR 2 Toileting hygiene: The ability to maintain perineal hygiene, adjust clothes before and after voiding or having a bowel movement. If managing an ostomy, include wiping the opening but not managing equipment. effective
